today.metaDescription: Review the nearest pending plans across every trip you can see.
today.title: Now
today.description: Collects pending plans from all visible trips, sorts them by proximity when you share your location, and keeps the map tucked away until you need it.
today.filters.title: Filter nearby plans
today.filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by plan, trip, or location
today.filters.includeWithoutDate: Also include plans without a date
today.filters.distanceHint: Enable your location to filter by maximum distance.
today.filters.distanceReady: Maximum distance only applies to plans with a known location.
today.location.ready: Plans with coordinates are now sorted by proximity.
today.location.imprecise: Your location is approximate, so distance ordering may shift slightly.
today.summary: {plans} visible plans out of {total} pending across {trips} trips.
today.empty.trips: You do not have any visible trips right now.
today.empty.plans: There are no pending plans in the trips you can see.
today.empty.filters: No plans match the selected filters.
today.map.idle: Open the map to review only the filtered plans and your current location if you shared it.
today.map.empty: There are not enough coordinates to show the map with the current filters.
today.map.onlyUserLocation: Only your current location can be shown because no filtered plan has valid coordinates.
today.map.withoutUserLocation: {count} filtered plans are shown on the map. Share your location to compare them to you.
today.map.ready: {count} filtered plans and your current location are shown.
today.map.unavailable: The map could not be loaded right now.
today.map.canvasLabel: Map with the filtered plans near you
